name: Whitefield Income Limited
analysis: WHI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 15% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.2900, stop A$1.2319, target A$1.4272 (2.36:1) — then trail it.
